description:
*Features*:
** V Brake Pads Sets*:5 pairs of 70mm brake pads which are suitable for most of V-brake road bike and mountain bike. Each pair includes one left and one right. In most cases,one bike needs 4 brake pads,a pair for front wheel,and another for the back wheel.
** More Safe Cycling*:The V bike block pads has good braking performance,can effectively prevent diversion or damage to wheel when braking,guard your riding,offer you sheer riding pleasure.
** Heat-Resistant & Water Leakage*:Each brake pad comes with two holes and three slots for ventilation and draining water away. Help your bike keep good brake performance in adverse weather conditions.
** Abrasion Resistant*:Made of hard-wearing rubber and aluminum alloy,our brake pads are supreme durable.
** Non-Slip Curved Design*:The unique grooves enhance the friction when braking,and can prevent sand or stone damages to the wheel rims.

NOTE:
* Please refer to our picture to distinguish right and left pads.

*Specifications*:
Product Type: V Bike Brake Pads
Material: Rubber+ Aluminum Alloy
Color: Black
Per Item Size: 7x4x0.8cm/ 2.76x 1.57x 0.31in
Per Item Weight: 36g/ 0.08lbs
Package Size: 15*15*3cm/5.90*5.90*1.18in
Package Weight: 351g/0.77lbs

*Package Lists*:
5 Pairs x V Bike Brake Pads
